subject: EPAM-014 requires plan mode — dependency count >= 2
body: EPAM-014 (Review — Multi-Agent Phase) has 2 declared dependencies: EPAM-012 and EPAM-013. Per phase policy, stories with >= 2 dependencies must enter plan mode before implementation. The review-agent must map verification criteria for both EPAM-012 (Ralph Wiggum Loop / quality scoring) and EPAM-013 (Squad Execution delegation chain) before proceeding. Confirm AbortController scope, Promise leak surface, and peer-review loop bounds in the plan.

subject: Cross-phase dependency risk: EPAM-014 depends on EPAM-012 from previous phase
body: EPAM-014 lists EPAM-012 as a dependency, which belongs to a prior implementation phase (agent_intelligence). Risk: if EPAM-012 is not fully landed or has open review comments, EPAM-014 cannot proceed. Coordination action required: verify EPAM-012 status is completed before scheduling EPAM-014. Escalate to orchestrator if EPAM-012 is blocked or pending re-work.

subject: Plan mode required: EPAM-015 Remote Constraint Injection
body: EPAM-015 requires plan mode before implementation. Triggers: humanHours=6 (threshold>=6), cpaConfidence=0.42 (very low — high uncertainty in estimate). Key risks: system prompt injection ordering, zod schema validation for untrusted backend data, session-scoped caching correctness. Review ConstraintLoader design and AgentRunner integration before coding. Files: src/constraints/ConstraintLoader.ts, src/constraints/types.ts, src/context/ContextBuilder.ts, src/agent/AgentRunner.ts.

subject: Risk: EPAM-015 cpaConfidence=0.42 — estimate uncertainty high
body: CPA confidence is 0.42 for EPAM-015 (Remote Constraint Injection). This is below the 0.5 threshold indicating high estimate uncertainty. The story touches security-sensitive areas (block-severity constraint injection, trust model from backend). Recommend: (1) confirm trust boundary assumption is acceptable with security reviewer before implementation, (2) add integration test for constraint bypass attempt, (3) clarify expiry filtering edge case (expiresAt exactly == now). cpaGate=review.

subject: Plan mode required: EPAM-016 Signature Auditor Agents
body: EPAM-016 requires plan mode before implementation. Triggers: humanHours=10 (threshold>=6), effort=high. Key concerns: (1) Promise.all parallel auditor execution must not share mutable AgentRunner state between instances, (2) severity threshold gate UX — holding response and prompting user requires careful REPL flow design, (3) /auditors slash command integration with SlashCommands.ts, (4) auditor persona isolation (each needs a fresh context). Files: src/auditors/types.ts, src/auditors/AuditorRegistry.ts, src/auditors/AuditorRunner.ts, src/agent/AgentRunner.ts, src/cli/repl/SlashCommands.ts.

subject: Cross-phase dependency: EPAM-017 depends on EPAM-004 (agent_intelligence)
body: EPAM-017 (Expertise Marketplace) has a cross-phase dependency on EPAM-004 (Agent Gold Profiles, agent_intelligence phase). Dependency status: COMPLETED (completedAt: 2026-02-28T21:38:18-05:00). ProfileStore and src/agent/profiles/types.ts are available. Implementation note: use ProfileStore from EPAM-004 to resolve @profile-name, inject systemPromptAppend as [CONSULTING: @profile-name] block, and load top-3 tag-matched decisions from .epam/decisions.jsonl. Consultation context must be strictly single-turn only — verify ContextBuilder does not persist the block across turns.

subject: Plan mode required: EPAM-018 Review — Enterprise Phase (3 deps)
body: EPAM-018 requires plan mode before execution. Trigger: dependencies count=3 (EPAM-015, EPAM-016, EPAM-017) which exceeds threshold of 2. This is the enterprise phase review story — it must not begin until all three implementation stories are verified complete. Review checklist: (1) ConstraintLoader block-severity bypass test, (2) AuditorRunner no-state-leak between parallel instances, (3) consultation single-turn isolation verified, (4) zod rejection of malformed constraint API response, (5) tsc --noEmit zero errors. Cross-phase: EPAM-017 dep on EPAM-004 already satisfied. Run vitest with full suite (42 tests) before marking phase complete.

subject: Enterprise phase coordination complete — phase_ready
body: Coordination pass complete for enterprise phase (EPAM-015, EPAM-016, EPAM-017, EPAM-018). Summary: plan_required flags raised for EPAM-015 (humanHours=6, cpaConfidence=0.42), EPAM-016 (humanHours=10, effort=high), EPAM-018 (deps=3). Cross-phase dependency flagged for EPAM-017 (on EPAM-004/agent_intelligence — satisfied/completed). Risk flag raised for EPAM-015 low cpaConfidence. All stories in main agentGroup — no cross-lane within-phase conflicts. Recommended execution order: EPAM-015 → EPAM-016 (parallel capable) → EPAM-017 → EPAM-018 (review gate). Phase is cleared to begin after plan mode approval for flagged stories.
